name: pension-ru-ceiling-crossing
behaviors: PENSION_2026 constants: EMPLOYER_RATE_PENSION=22, EMPLOYER_RATE_MEDICAL=5.1, EMPLOYER_RATE_SOCIAL=2.9 (within ceiling)
PENSION_2026 above-ceiling rates: PENSION=0.1, MEDICAL=0, SOCIAL=15 (above ceiling)
pensionSplitFor2026: within (1M) → pension=220000, medical=51000, social=29000, aboveCeiling=false
pensionSplitFor2026: above (10M) → pension=557500, medical=127500, social=1197500, aboveCeiling=true
pensionSplitFor2026: at exact ceiling (2.5M) → aboveCeiling=false (boundary is inclusive)
pensionEmployerMonthly: full above (10M) → within=2.5M, above=7.5M, pension=557500
pensionEmployerMonthly: cross-ceiling (200k @ 2.4M YTD) → within=100k, above=100k, pension=22100
pensionEmployerMonthly: Math.round per ст. 52 (100,001 → pension=22000, not 22000.22)
pension_ru.js has NO fs require (pure functions only)
rationale: Wrong numbers = tax liabilities. Cross-ceiling month math + rates per НК РФ ст. 425-430 + ФЗ № 425-ФЗ.
